use std::collections::HashMap;
use std::sync::{Arc, RwLock};

struct SessionCache {
    // BAD: unbounded cache with no eviction or size limit
    sessions: RwLock<HashMap<String, Vec<u8>>>,
}

impl SessionCache {
    fn new() -> Self {
        Self {
            sessions: RwLock::new(HashMap::new()),
        }
    }

    fn insert(&self, session_id: String, data: Vec<u8>) {
        self.sessions.write().unwrap().insert(session_id, data);
    }

    fn get(&self, session_id: &str) -> Option<Vec<u8>> {
        self.sessions.read().unwrap().get(session_id).cloned()
    }
}

async fn handle_request(cache: Arc<SessionCache>, session_id: &str) {
    if cache.get(session_id).is_none() {
        let data = vec![0u8; 4096];
        cache.insert(session_id.to_string(), data);
    }
}
